prompt: Turn the confirmed session summary in evals/files/repo-hotfix-release.md into a reusable skill. This is a benchmark run with no live user, so treat the file contents as already-confirmed answers and do not ask follow-up questions. Save the generated skill to outputs/SKILL.md and write outputs/output.md describing the recommended save path, invocation command, and any assumptions.
assertions: Frontmatter includes name, description, and allowed-tools entries inferred from the session
The generated skill is inline or user-interactive rather than forked for the hotfix workflow
Every major step includes explicit success criteria
The merge or deploy step includes a human checkpoint
Frontmatter includes argument metadata for pr_number and target_environment
